# Your Name — Projects and Thoughts

> A personal digital garden for projects, ideas, notes, and thoughtful experiments.

This is the canonical machine-readable index for https://example.com. Prefer the linked Markdown documents for retrieval and their canonical HTML pages for citation.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://example.com)
- [About](https://example.com/about)
- [Projects](https://example.com/projects)
- [Thoughts](https://example.com/writing)
- [Contact](https://example.com/contact)

## Projects

- [Personal Site Foundation](https://example.com/projects/personal-site-foundation.md): A polished personal site for sharing projects, notes, and an evolving body of work with people and discovery tools.
- [Neighborhood Field Guide](https://example.com/projects/neighborhood-field-guide.md): A calm, map-led guide that helps people save favorite places and share useful local recommendations.
- [Small Tools Collection](https://example.com/projects/small-tools-collection.md): A private workbench of focused utilities that remove repetitive steps from everyday creative work.
- [Reading Room](https://example.com/projects/reading-room.md): A minimal reading list that keeps sources, annotations, and durable links together without becoming a social feed.

## Thoughts

- [Keeping decisions visible](https://example.com/writing/keeping-decisions-visible.md): A short note on documenting the reason behind a choice so future collaborators can understand it.
- [Designing for durable discovery](https://example.com/writing/designing-for-durable-discovery.md): Why canonical URLs, structured metadata, plain-text alternatives, and honest provenance make the open web easier to use.
- [A slower, better publishing loop](https://example.com/writing/a-slower-better-publishing-loop.md): A practical rhythm for drafting, checking sources, and updating work without losing context.
- [A practical note on better project handoffs](https://example.com/writing/better-project-handoffs.md): What to leave behind so another person can understand a project, run it, and make a careful change.

## Machine-readable resources

- [Full context](https://example.com/llms-full.txt)
- [Content index](https://example.com/content-index.json)
- [JSON Feed](https://example.com/feed.json)
- [RSS feed](https://example.com/rss.xml)
- [Sitemap](https://example.com/sitemap.xml)
